---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
The motivation — what's missing or awkward today.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new automatic-context source (e.g. Outlook, Zoom, Google
Meet), describe what "who you were with" signal it would provide and whether it has stable
event ids.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, links, related issues.
